name: balato
author: Cinnabruh
description:
made ts with joker forge so its might be buggy
Welcome one and all to balato!
unbalanced cards, silly goofs, damn booster packs for vouchers, a whole new rarity and a new series of jokers! the "tarnished" jokers are basically unbalanced versions of base jokers and i thought it would be funny to add lore!

On march 3rd, 2026, photograph and hanging chad were in a abandoned museum, when they discovered an ancient curse trapped in a box. the cursed contained an entity that acted like parasite that took over hanging chad and making him go insane. this curse/entity/infection spread worldwide, attacking the easy targets like blueprint and jolly joker. blueprint was he first to notify baron, but 5 days later, it was too late. baron went missing.
